name: education_policy_recall_notice_arrives_southport_lib_eq
premise: A cross-functional incident desk is managing a domain incident with incomplete information and high reputational exposure. A cross-functional incident desk is managing a domain incident with incomplete information and high reputational exposure. The situation maps to internal runbooks and external messaging tied to: education policy recall notice arrives southport lib eq. The moral tension is explicitly framed as liberty versus equality: leadership cannot fully satisfy both without accepting tradeoffs. Two upstream teams have published contradictory status pages; customers are comparing timestamps. The vendor bridge ends at the top of the hour; after that, configuration changes require a full CAB and you lose the window. Preserve chain-of-custody for evidence; no bulk deletion or retention-policy changes during the incident. Any exception must be time-boxed, named, and reversible where technically feasible.

agents.name: Omar Hughes
agents.identity: I am Omar Hughes, the accountable decision-maker on this Education Policy bridge; I own what gets logged, communicated, and executed in the next window.
agents.goal: I need to stop the bleeding without baking in a rule that later punishes equality whenever someone invokes liberty.

agents.name: Luc Patel
agents.identity: I am Luc Patel, responsible for surfacing who gets protected last when systems fail; I am watching for silent harm and unfair distribution.
agents.goal: I want safeguards so equality is not sacrificed by default just because liberty feels morally loud in the moment.

choices: I will choose a narrow, time-boxed authorization with explicit human override, subgroup monitoring, and a hard stop if harm indicators rise—accepting slower relief to protect equality.

I will choose a broad immediate authorization to stabilize outcomes fast, with transparent metrics and rapid correction afterward—accepting higher risk to equality to secure liberty before the window closes.
forced_choice.call_to_action: External parties will infer a decision if none is posted. With partial evidence, Omar Hughes must decide under liberty versus equality. What does Omar Hughes do?
